_comment: Documents ACTUAL current behavior, not an invented expectation: WorkforceImportService processes rows sequentially, each in its own transaction, upserting by national_id. Row 1 inserts a worker with national_id 009000050; by the time row 2 (same national_id) runs, that worker already exists in the SAME company, so row 2 just updates it -- last-row-wins, NOT a validation error. This fixture exists to pin that behavior down as a regression test, since a naive reader might expect an in-file-duplicate error that this codebase does not actually implement.
